case_title: ROGELIO B DOMINGO JR. VS. MUNTHER QUTAMI ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT QUTAMI, MUNTHER
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOMINGO JR., ROGELIO B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUTAMI, MUNTHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5400 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94112, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EVICTION; DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE:NOTICE FILED BY DEFENDANT QUTAMI, MUNTHER

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT QUTAMI, MUNTHER
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOMINGO JR., ROGELIO B AS TO DEFENDANT QUTAMI, MUNTHER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
